character.definition: fierce dog with long shaggy hair; an old name for a part of the Miao nationality (in southwestern China)
(same as ancient form of 訊) to ask; to inquire; to question, information; news
(same as 踣) to stumble and fall
surname; a kind of pheasant; plumes

variants.raw_value: 钟	鍾 鐘 鈡
